name: Pumpkin Macaroons//
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pecans, flour, lemon peel, and coconut in a medium bowl.
2. Beat the egg white with a hand mixer until soft peaks form in another medium bowl.
3. Gradually add syrup and vanilla to the beaten egg white, mixing well.
4. Gently fold the mixture into the pecan mixture, adding pumpkin as you go.
5. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the batter onto the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Let cool at room temperature for 30 minutes.
8. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
9. Bake in the mid-oven until just beginning to brown, about 25-30 minutes.
10. Allow cookies to cool completely on a wire rack before storing tightly covered.
